decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs' matches the nearest registry record exactly. Per rule: when closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new' (observation already resolves to that id). The source 201111_nostrand_cb1_slides is already listed among that registry record's source_ids; the observation confirms the existing record's identity.
